title: Cognito auth + strict tenant isolation for API and IoT topics
description:
## Intent
Secure API and realtime channels with tenant-scoped authorization.

## Scope
- Cognito User Pool JWT auth for API access
- Cognito Identity Pool permissions for IoT WSS
- Policy scoping by `account/project` topic and path

## Definition of Done
- Cross-tenant API access is denied by policy.
- Cross-tenant topic subscribe/publish is denied by policy.
- Tenant claim mapping and auth flow are documented.
- Automated tests cover authorized and unauthorized paths.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Starting Cognito auth + tenant isolation implementation.
Evidence: task moved open -> in_progress.
Next: enforce JWT auth at API Gateway and add IoT policy scaffolding for tenant-scoped topic access.
Risk/Blocker: none.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Added Cognito-authorized API gateway wiring and tenant-scoped IoT policy scaffolding.
Evidence: proxy API methods now require Cognito authorizer; authenticated role includes IoT connect + tenant-topic subscribe/receive policy using principal tags.
Next: add verification coverage and document claim/tag mapping flow in more operational detail.
Risk/Blocker: principal-tag mapping must be configured by identity flow for strict topic isolation.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Progress: Added automated auth/isolation template tests and documentation for tenant tag mapping.
Evidence: `infra/cloud/tests/test_auth_isolation.py` validates Cognito authorizer on API methods and tenant-scoped IoT policy strings; `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v` passed (2 tests).
Next: close this task and continue 5.4 hardening.
Risk/Blocker: none.
